content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Mar 28, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today's activity focused on expanding the plugin registry with a new entry and ongoing discussions within existing issues, particularly regarding API usage and migration challenges.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No new features, bug fixes, code refactoring, documentation enhancements, or tests were added today.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#323](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/323), was opened to add `@desideapp/plugin-deside` to the registry.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES
No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
### API Endpoint Clarification and Usage
Discussions continued on [#5121](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/5121), which addresses an "API endpoint not found" error for `/api/agents/{agentId}/rooms`. The latest comments from `majorelalexis-stack` (Mar 28, 2026) highlight their work on MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace, and express interest in collaboration or integration. Earlier comments from `wtfsayo` (Jun 15, 2025) provided detailed guidance on the current REST API structure for messaging, emphasizing the shift from "rooms" to "channels" and outlining the correct endpoints for sending messages to and from agents. This includes examples for `POST /api/messaging/central-channels/{channelId}/messages` and `POST /api/messaging/submit`, along with methods to discover channel IDs.

### Migration Challenges
Issue [#6535](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6535), concerning the migration from ai16z to ElizaOS, saw recent activity. `rohmario` (Mar 28, 2026) stated they do not have a solution for the missed migration deadline, suggesting there might not be one. This follows `marcellv67-beep`'s comment (Mar 28, 2026) also seeking a solution for the same migration problem, specifically regarding tokens on Phantom.
